components.name: PostgreSQL Database
components.description: Stores users and URL references to audio and images stored on Cloudinary

components.name: Express Server
components.description: Fetches data from PostgreSQL database using Sequelize, serves React frontend, JWT token validation

components.name: Cloudinary
components.description: Stores audio and generates waveform visuals, stores images, sends back URLs

components.name: React Frontend
components.description: Redux for state management, actions upload images and audio to Cloudinary, takes URLs received from Cloudinary and sends to backend to be stored, app component controls playback of audio, sound component visualizes playback

connectors.label: Frontend makes Fetch calls to backend to store user and sound data
Frontend sends audio and image files
Cloudinary sends back URLs leading to files

components.name: Frontend (React/Redux)
components.description: Includes components like App.js, Home.js, Profile.js, etc.

components.name: Backend (Node.js/Express)
components.description: Includes controllers like Auth Controller, Sound Controller, etc.

groups.name: User Authentication
groups.description: Handles user login and JWT storage

comparison.explanation: The GroundTruth diagram provides a high-level overview of the Soundzone application architecture, focusing on the main components and their interactions. It highlights the PostgreSQL Database, Express Server, Cloudinary, and React Frontend, showing data flow between them. The GeneratedImage diagram is a sequence diagram detailing user interactions and data flow between the frontend, backend, and external services like Cloudinary. It includes user actions and specific API calls, which are not present in the GroundTruth diagram. Both diagrams share common components like the React Frontend, Express Server, and Cloudinary, but the GroundTruth diagram uniquely includes the PostgreSQL Database. The GeneratedImage diagram introduces user interactions and specific frontend and backend components, providing a more detailed view of the application's operation. Rating: 8. The GeneratedImage is accurate in detailing the interactions and components but lacks the explicit mention of the PostgreSQL Database, which is a key component in the GroundTruth diagram.
